name: Bluefish in Parchment
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp + 1 tsp Margarine, tub (style, reduced calorie)
1 cup Red bell pepper, thinly sliced
4 Parchment paper (12-inch squares) or aluminum foil
4 Bluefish or salmon fillets (3 to 4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium nonstick skillet, melt margarine. Add scallions; cook, stirring frequently, for 2 minutes. Add mushrooms, pepper, savory and marjoram; stir-fry for 4 minutes, until just tender. Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F. Cut each parchment square into a large heart shape and place on the work surface. In a medium bowl, combine snow peas, barley, and rice. Divide barley mixture equally over one half of each heart. Place bluefish on top of barley. Divide vegetables equally over bluefish; sprinkle with salt.
3. Fold parchment loosely to enclose filling. Starting at one end, turn edges together in overlapping folds to make a tight seal. Place packets on a baking sheet. Bake for 12 minutes, until puffed.
4. To serve, place packets on dinner plates; slit open carefully and fold top parchment back.
